subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! In the verses of the Qur'án it is proclaimed: "Then We caused those of Our servants whom We had chosen to inherit the Book." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در ایه فرقان میفرماید ثم اورثنا الکتاب الذین اصطفینا من عبادنا
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual transformation, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
